description_long: This is a modern double grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring two distinct upright headstones—one black and one gray—crafted from polished granite. The headstones are joined at the base and separated by a central groove, with the black headstone bearing visible inscriptions and a star-shaped metallic ornament. The grave cover is made of matching gray granite slabs, bordered by a black stone strip, and the entire structure rests on a larger, lighter stone platform. A potted green plant is placed at the head of the grave, adding a touch of natural color to the otherwise monochrome design. The materials and finish suggest durability and a solemn, respectful aesthetic typical of contemporary cemetery monuments. The overall appearance is clean, well-maintained, and designed to honor the memory of those interred.
description: A modern double grave monument with black and gray granite headstones, a matching stone cover, and a potted plant at the head. The design is polished, solemn, and features visible inscriptions and a metallic star ornament.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black and gray upright headstones, the central groove, and the potted plant on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstones, the layered stone base, and the plant positioned at the head.
description_view_2: Direct frontal view displaying the inscriptions, the star ornament, the central groove, and the full layout of the grave cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plant on the right, the layered stone structure, and the profile of the headstones.
